navigation.archive_path: homepage -> latest-issues/the-supplement -> article pages; the-supplement exposes direct .pdf links, and archives point back to Maurer's Law Library / HeinOnline for older issues
navigation.notes: Latest Issues and The Supplement are crawlable WordPress pages with article links. The Supplement page exposes direct PDF links in the HTML; Latest Issues links article titles to repository.viewcontent URLs. Smoke failed previously because ilj.law.indiana.edu was not registered in new_scraper/adapters/registry.py. Recommended adapter is WordPressAcademicBaseAdapter.

metadata.notes: Verified WordPress site with crawlable issue pages and direct/discoverable PDFs. The prior smoke failure was routing-only, not a site failure.
